faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common inquiries from our graduates.
faq.q1: How can I request my graduation certificate?
faq.a1: You can request a certificate through the 'Certificates' section in your dashboard and follow the steps to book a pickup appointment.
faq.q4: What are the required documents for postgraduate studies?
faq.a4:
Required documents include:

1. Graduation certificate
2. Grade transcript
3. Certificate of good conduct
4. Birth certificate
5. 4 personal photos
6. Copy of national ID
7. Employer approval (if employed).
faq.q5: What are the required documents for receiving a graduation certificate?
faq.a5:
Requirements for graduates include:

1. Clearance form
2. Grade transcript
3. Personal photo
4. Graduation statement
5. Birth certificate
6. Payment of certificate fees.
